patch.value: GH-534: no-op update reports phantom changed_fields in --json while TOON reports empty, and changed_field_count is always null in JSON

A no-op pm update (field set to its current value) emits changed_fields:['title'] in --json but an empty changed_fields in TOON — the two formats disagree about whether anything changed; agents keying off JSON see phantom mutations. Additionally changed_field_count is computed for TOON but left null in the JSON envelope. Fix: compute changed_fields once from the actual before/after diff and share it across both renderers (uniform output contract — pm-srns territory), and populate changed_field_count as a number (0 for no-op). Check update-many/close envelopes for the same divergence at fix time.

No-op update reports empty changed_fields in BOTH json and toon; changed_field_count numeric in JSON (0 no-op, N real); update-many/close checked for the same divergence; regression tests; GH-534 closed
